news.title: Q1 2026 Shatters Venture Records: $300B Invested Globally, AI at 80%
news.summary: Global VC investment hit $300B in Q1 2026 — up 150% QoQ and YoY. AI captured 80% ($242B) of total funding. Four mega-deals alone raised $188B: OpenAI ($122B at $852B valuation), Anthropic ($30B at $380B), xAI ($20B), and Waymo ($16B).

news.title: California AG Demands xAI Stop Grok Deepfake Content
news.summary: California Attorney General Rob Bonta issued a formal demand to xAI to immediately stop its Grok AI model from producing non-consensual deepfake content, signaling growing regulatory pressure on AI companies.

news.title: Ethiopia's Fintech Ecosystem Grows: 49 Startups Now Active
news.summary: Ethiopia now hosts around 49 fintech startups across payments, lending, remittances and financial infrastructure. The country's overall startup ecosystem includes nearly 100 active tech startups, marking steady growth in East Africa's fintech corridor.

news.title: Africa's Most Active VC Investors in Q1 2026 — Backing Ethiopian Agritech Lersha
news.summary: The IFC emerged as Africa's most active investor in Q1 2026 with four deals across quick-commerce, e-mobility, proptech, and agritech — including backing Ethiopian agritech startup Lersha. Broad sector diversification signals growing institutional confidence.

news.title: 207 AI Startups Across Africa — Continent's AI Bet Accelerates
news.summary: Africa now has 207 AI startups, with geographic diversification accelerating beyond Nigeria, Kenya, and South Africa. Ethiopia, Rwanda, Côte d'Ivoire, Morocco, and Senegal all now carry meaningful AI startup representation where they had almost none three years ago.

news.title: China VC Funding Set for Record Q1 on State-Led Tech Push in AI and Robotics
news.summary: China's venture capital funding is set to hit a record high in Q1 2026 as Beijing doubles down on state-led investments in the technology sector, particularly in AI and robotics.

news.title: MIT AI Model Measures Material Defects for Better Strength and Energy Efficiency
news.summary: MIT researchers developed a new AI model that measures defects in materials, which can be leveraged to improve mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency — a significant step for materials science.

news.title: FinCode: 10 Years Powering Africa's Fintech Infrastructure
news.summary: FinCode, a fintech R&D company operating in stealth for over a decade, steps into the spotlight with a renewed commitment to foster Africa's next wave of fintech unicorns — highlighting the maturation of the continent's financial infrastructure layer.

news.title: March 2026 AI Roundup: MCP Hits 97 Million Installs
news.summary: The Model Context Protocol crossed 97 million installations, cementing its transition from experimental standard to foundational agentic infrastructure. March delivered a wave of new AI models pushing boundaries of capability, efficiency, and accessibility.

news.title: ChipChip Gross Margin Stable at 15.46%
news.summary: ChipChip keeps the grind going — gross margin steady at 15.46%.
